# Code of Conduct

## Our Standard

We want this project to be a respectful, inclusive, and productive place to collaborate.

Expected behavior:

- Be respectful and constructive.
- Focus feedback on the work, not the person.
- Assume good intent and ask clarifying questions.
- Share context when disagreeing on technical decisions.

Unacceptable behavior:

- Harassment, discrimination, or intimidation.
- Personal attacks or hostile language.
- Publishing private information without consent.
- Repeated disruptive behavior after feedback.

## Enforcement

Maintainers may edit, remove, or reject contributions that violate this code.
Serious or repeated violations can lead to temporary or permanent participation restrictions.

## Reporting

Report conduct issues privately to maintainers.
If the issue includes security impact, also follow `.github/SECURITY.md`.
